+log "  Initial admin password:"
+log "    kubectl -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo"
+    | tee -a "$OUT_DIR/kpi4-$TS.txt" || echo "(InfluxDB query failed — revisa el token si no hay salida)"
+      | grep -iE '(password|passwd|token|api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|bearer)' \
           password: ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN }}
+                - name: PGPASSWORD
    InfluxDB now reads its admin password and init token from the
    the manual post-deploy token generation. The token is shared with
    services via influxdb-token, so the pipeline is fully declarative.
         - name: DOCKER_INFLUXDB_INIT_PASSWORD

+    password: 
+    token:
